_fixture_notes: Case 16: Derived component with non-sorted AND duplicated step_indices. Parent has 5 steps (indices 0-4). Derived component step_indices: [3, 1, 1, 2] — out of order, and index 1 appears twice. Spec requires valid 0-based indices but is silent on ordering and uniqueness. Tests validator strictness on array contents and importer behaviour on duplicate step copying.
name: Pickled Cucumber Side
description: Quick cucumber pickle with a derived component referencing out-of-order, duplicated step indices.

steps.title: Salt the cucumber
steps.content: Toss {0001} with a pinch of salt and leave to draw out moisture for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Make the dressing
steps.content: Whisk {0002}, {0003} and {0004} until the sugar dissolves.

steps.title: Drain the cucumber
steps.content: Squeeze {0001} gently to remove the drawn-out moisture.

steps.title: Combine and rest
steps.content: Toss the cucumber with the dressing and rest for 5 minutes.

derived_components.name: Pickled Cucumber (Component)
derived_components.description: Standalone pickled cucumber for use as a side or topping.
derived_components.notes: step_indices [3, 1, 1, 2] is intentionally non-sorted and contains a duplicate.
